condition-note.label: Alert conditions are checked from top to bottom, so order them from most specific to least specific.

multiple-media-note.label: If multiple images/videos/sounds are added to an alert, a random one is chosen each time the alert plays.

follow-shadow-spread.label: Shadow Spread (px)
follow-shadow-spread.description: Can be used to create an outline.

raid-shadow-spread.label: Shadow Spread (px)
raid-shadow-spread.description: Can be used to create an outline.

reward-text.label: Alert Text
reward-text.description:
{username} - User Name
{reward} - Channel Point Reward Name
{amount} - Reward Cost
{message} - User Redeem Message

reward-shadow-spread.label: Shadow Spread (px)
reward-shadow-spread.description: Can be used to create an outline.

power-up-text.label: Alert Text
power-up-text.description:
{username} - User Name
{power_up} - Power-Up Name
{amount} - Power-Up Cost
{message} - User Redeem Message

power-up-shadow-spread.label: Shadow Spread (px)
power-up-shadow-spread.description: Can be used to create an outline.

cheer-text.label: Alert Text
cheer-text.description:
{username} - Cheerer Name
{amount} - Number of Bits
{message} - Cheer Message

cheer-shadow-spread.label: Shadow Spread (px)
cheer-shadow-spread.description: Can be used to create an outline.

sub-text.label: Alert Text
sub-text.description:
{username} - Subscriber Name
{sub_tier} - Subscription Tier
{amount} - Months Subscribed
{message} - User Resubscription Message

sub-shadow-spread.label: Shadow Spread (px)
sub-shadow-spread.description: Can be used to create an outline.

gift-sub-text.label: Alert Text

{sub_tier} - Subscription Tier
{amount} - Number of Gift Subscriptions

gift-sub-shadow-spread.label: Shadow Spread (px)
gift-sub-shadow-spread.description: Can be used to create an outline.

global-description.label: These options will be applied to all alerts.

hide-words.label: Hide alerts that contain these words:

plurality-text.label:
User system and member information is sourced from https://pluralmind.chat/
Not sure what plurality is? Consider checking out https://morethanone.info/
Currently only compatible with alerts related to chat messages, such as Cheers, Resubs, etc.

plurality-support.label: Plurality Support?
plurality-support.description: Uses a member's name when a proxied alert is detected.

plurality-show-usernames.label: Keep Original Usernames?
plurality-show-usernames.description: Shows the user's Twitch username in parentheses after their member name.
